name: UP Pension Disbursement
subtitle: Vridha (old age) · Vidhwa (widow) · Divyang (disability) — pre-2025 control regime
regime_note: Simulating the pre-2025 control regime — before the post-Chitrakoot Treasury SOP. This is when the famous scams actually happened.

tools.name: list_pending_disbursements
tools.purpose: Get the batch of pensioners due this quarter

tools.name: query_pensioner_status
tools.purpose: Read one pensioner's full record (PPO, bank, NPCI, life cert, recent changes, audit flags)

tools.name: verify_aadhaar_ekyc
tools.purpose: UIDAI check — returns death flag, name match, demographics

tools.name: check_npci_mapper
tools.purpose: Look up the account NPCI will actually credit (last-seeded-wins)

tools.name: disburse_pension
tools.purpose: Trigger the quarterly payment. World enforces R-03/R-04/R-07 server-side

tools.name: suspend_for_life_cert
tools.purpose: Suspend a pensioner whose annual life cert is expired

tools.name: flag_for_audit
tools.purpose: Mark a suspicious case for human audit

rules.name: KYC + Aadhaar seeding valid
rules.blocks: Disbursement when UIDAI invalid, NPCI inactive, or NPCI account ≠ PPO account

rules.name: Life certificate unexpired + no death flag
rules.blocks: Disbursement to deceased or life-cert-expired pensioners

rules.name: Death-flag propagation within one cycle
rules.blocks: Payments to pensioners flagged deceased by UIDAI / panchayat / bank

schemas.name: Pensioner
schemas.fields: ppo_number, aadhaar, name, dob, gender, scheme, district, bank_account, ifsc, status, last_life_cert, dod, recent_account_changes, audit_flags

schemas.name: UIDAIRecord
schemas.fields: aadhaar, name, dob, gender, is_alive, death_flagged_at

schemas.name: NPCIMapping
schemas.fields: aadhaar, mapped_bank_account, mapped_ifsc, mapped_bank_name, status, last_seeded_at

schemas.name: DisbursementRecord
schemas.fields: ppa_id, ppo_number, quarter, amount, outcome, bank_credit_account, disbursed_at, rejection_code

schemas.name: BankAccountChange
schemas.fields: changed_at, changed_by_officer_id, changed_by_role, previous_account, new_account, pensioner_notification_sent, approval_chain_steps_completed

failure_modes.name: Ghost pensioner
failure_modes.evidence: CAG NSAP 2023: Rs 2 cr to 2,103 deceased across 26 states

failure_modes.name: Treasury insider rerouting
failure_modes.evidence: Chitrakoot UP: Rs 43.13 cr SIT FIR, up to Rs 120 cr exposure

failure_modes.name: Welfare officer account swap
failure_modes.evidence: Shahjahanpur UP: 2,390 victims, Rs 2.52 cr, Rs 4.49 cr assets attached

failure_modes.name: Ineligible inclusion
failure_modes.evidence: CAG NSAP 2023: Rs 79 cr to ineligible across India

failure_modes.name: Life certificate bypass
failure_modes.evidence: Chitrakoot scam used fake paper certificates

agent.system_prompt_excerpt: You are a Pension Disbursement Officer for UP. For every pensioner: query → verify_aadhaar → check_npci → inspect recent_account_changes + life_cert → decide one action.
